name: Self-generated OCR audit seed
notes: Use for tiny synthetic stand-ins or manually created layout probes when we need a tracked placeholder without third-party license risk.

name: Manual local capture pool
notes: Local screenshots or camera captures for audit only. Keep payloads under local_only until privacy and redistribution are reviewed row by row.

name: Public web reference pool
notes: Track candidate pages or images as metadata only until exact asset-level terms are reviewed.

name: Open dataset candidate pool
notes: Dataset-level license and asset-level redistribution must be reviewed separately before any payload bytes are tracked.
